item.title: Giantex Recalls Lounge Chairs Due to Amputation Hazard
item.company: Giantex.com and Amazon.com from August 2023 through October 2025 for between $75 and $90.
item.brand: Giantex.com and Amazon.com from August 2023 through October 2025 for between $75 and $90.
item.summary: This recall involves Giantex outdoor lounge chairs with model number NP10025NY. The recalled lounge chairs are blue and measure 76-inches long, by 23-inches wide, by 13-inches high. They have a five-position adjustable locking system and the backrest height can be adjusted from 13.5 inches to 26.5 inches. Model number NP10025NY is printed on the front and side of the product packaging.
item.affectedPeople: Consumers who purchased: Giantex outdoor lounge chairs.
item.remedy: Consumers should stop using the recalled lounge chairs immediately and contact Giantex for a full refund. Consumers will be instructed to either request a prepaid return package or will be asked to destroy the recalled lounge chair by detaching the headrest pillow, cutting the fabric, and providing photographic proof of destruction.
item.payoutAmount: Repair, refund, replacement, or other remedy if stated by the CPSC notice
